block_00: 50 US Stocks to Trade on Margin
block_01: We are pleased to announce that we’ve added 50 new stocks of the leading US companies to trade on margin.
block_04: For a complete list of stocks available please open the
block_06: tab on the IQ Option website.
block_07: What are the benefits of trading CFDs on margin?
block_08: Margin is the percentage of the full trade value that a trader needs to deposit to open a position.
block_09: When trading Margin CFDs on the IQ Option trading platform, traders can control larger positions with margins starting from 0.33%. Thus, for example, if a trader wants to open a margin position worth $10,000, he only needs to invest $33.
block_12: To activate margin balance in the traderoom, open the balance selector tab and click on the Enable button.
block_18: We wish you a pleasant trading experience!
